## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and technical improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content sourcing: Mix of proprietary tour photos (\~70%) and stock images, with a focus on using Adventures Group's own assets first](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [SEO performance: Early positive results for nightlife content, particularly in Cabo and Cancún](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Technical challenges: Potential sitemap and redirect issues affecting content indexing; manual formatting problems in Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Content expansion: Plans to create more location-specific articles, especially for beach areas beyond main destinations](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)

## Topics

### Content Asset Sourcing

  - [Primary focus on using Adventures Group's own tour photos (\~70% of current usage)](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Stock images used as supplementary source, especially for general topics or public spaces](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Past use of user-generated content (UGC) from social media, but discontinued due to manual effort and permission concerns](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Potential future integration of UGC through "Kink" provider, pending team agreement and user authorization](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)

### SEO Performance and Indexing

  - [Positive early results for nightlife content:](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
      - [Cabo: \~3,000 impressions in short time](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
      - [Cancún: Ranking for "Cancun nightlife" in Spanish](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Some indexing delays for new content (e.g., Cancún and Cabo San Lucas nightlife)](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
  - [Kyle to investigate potential technical issues:](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
      - [Sitemap validation](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
      - [Redirect problems identified in Google Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [Possible content freshness factor](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)

### Content Publishing Workflow

  - [Ongoing issues with HTML formatting and markdown in Sanity CMS](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Danielle to attempt replicating the process to identify solutions](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Developer acknowledges the problem but focused on different project; manual fixes required in the interim](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

### Content Strategy and Expansion

  - [Improved integration of tour mentions in beach articles (e.g., Cozumel, Puerto Vallarta, Cabo)](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Plans to develop additional location-specific articles:](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [Separate article for Riviera Maya/Playa del Carmen beaches](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
      - [Exploration of nearby areas for Puerto Vallarta](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Mariana to conduct keyword research based on location lists provided by Isabel](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)

### Reporting and Documentation

  - [Hector requested access to document containing published content data](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Mariana to share recent report on total blog post count (including both new and existing articles)](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=889.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to investigate technical SEO issues and provide recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Danielle to work on Sanity CMS formatting solution](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Mariana to prepare new batch of articles for review](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Isabel to provide lists of nearby locations for keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Mariana to conduct keyword research for potential new articles](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Hector to review shared content data document and recent blog post report](https://fathom.video/share/xfYtWoQU1JAtsMgfuYwSTp2pPkEfteuQ?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
